pairs.en: Thursday, January 29, 2026 at 7:00 a.m. ET
pairs.zh:
2026年1月29日星期四上午7:00 ET  
Thursday, January 29, 2026 at 7:00 a.m. ET

pairs.en: Call participants
pairs.zh: 呼叫参与者

pairs.en: President and Chief Financial Officer — Alex Peng
pairs.zh:
总裁兼首席财务官 — Alex Peng

President and Chief Financial Officer — Alex Peng

pairs.en: Deputy Chief Financial Officer — Jackson Ding
pairs.zh:
副首席财务官 — Jackson Ding  
Deputy Chief Financial Officer — Jackson Ding

pairs.en: Director of Investor Relations — Fang Liu
pairs.zh:
投资者关系总监 — Fang Liu

Director of Investor Relations — Fang Liu

pairs.en: Net Revenues-- $770.2 million, increasing 27% year over year, representing 5,480.4 million RMB with a 26.8% increase in local currency terms.
pairs.zh:
净收入——770.2百万美元，同比增长27%，折合5,480.4百万人民币，按当地货币计算增长26.8%。

Net Revenues-- $770.2 million, increasing 27% year over year, representing 5,480.4 million RMB with a 26.8% increase in local currency terms.

pairs.en: Gross Profit-- $431.8 million, up 35% year over year, resulting in gross margin expansion from 52.7% to 56.1%.
pairs.zh:
毛利润 -- 4.318亿美元，同比增长35%，毛利率从52.7%扩大至56.1%。

Gross Profit-- $431.8 million, up 35% year over year, resulting in gross margin expansion from 52.7% to 56.1%.

pairs.en: Non-GAAP Operating Income-- $104.0 million compared with a non-GAAP operating loss of $1.9 million in the prior year period.
pairs.zh:
非GAAP营运收入——1.04亿美元，而上年同期非GAAP营运亏损为190万美元。  
Non-GAAP Operating Income-- $104.0 million compared with a non-GAAP operating loss of $1.9 million in the prior year period.

pairs.en: Net Income Attributable to TAL-- $130.6 million versus $23.1 million the previous year; non-GAAP net income rose to $141.4 million from $38.6 million.
pairs.zh:
归属于TAL的净利润——$130.6 million，去年同期为$23.1 million；non-GAAP净利润从$38.6 million增至$141.4 million。

Net Income Attributable to TAL-- $130.6 million versus $23.1 million the previous year; non-GAAP net income rose to $141.4 million from $38.6 million.

pairs.en: Cost of Revenues-- $338.4 million, up 18% year over year, while non-GAAP cost of revenues increased 18.4% to $338.0 million.
pairs.zh:
收入成本——3.384亿美元，同比增长18%，而非公认会计准则收入成本增长18.4%，达到3.380亿美元。

Cost of Revenues-- $338.4 million, up 18% year over year, while non-GAAP cost of revenues increased 18.4% to $338.0 million.

pairs.en: Selling and Marketing Expenses-- $220.1 million, a 2.8% decrease from $226.4 million; non-GAAP selling and marketing expenses fell 2.1% to $217.6 million, moving from 36.7% to 28.3% of net revenues.
pairs.zh:
销售与营销费用——2.201亿美元，较2.264亿美元下降2.8%；non-GAAP销售与营销费用下降2.1%至2.176亿美元，占净收入的比例从36.7%降至28.3%。

Selling and Marketing Expenses-- $220.1 million, a 2.8% decrease from $226.4 million; non-GAAP selling and marketing expenses fell 2.1% to $217.6 million, moving from 36.7% to 28.3% of net revenues.

pairs.en: General and Administrative Expenses-- $118.6 million, up 7.1%; non-GAAP G&A rose 10% to $110.7 million, but fell as a share of revenue from 16.6% to 14.4%.
pairs.zh:
一般及行政费用——1.186亿美元，增长7.1%；非GAAP一般及行政费用增长10%至1.107亿美元，但占收入比重从16.6%下降至14.4%。

General and Administrative Expenses-- $118.6 million, up 7.1%; non-GAAP G&A rose 10% to $110.7 million, but fell as a share of revenue from 16.6% to 14.4%.

pairs.en: Share-Based Compensation Expenses-- Total decreased by 30.2% to $10.8 million compared to $15.5 million last year.
pairs.zh:
基于股份的补偿费用——总额较去年的1550万美元下降30.2%至1080万美元。  
Share-Based Compensation Expenses-- Total decreased by 30.2% to $10.8 million compared to $15.5 million last year.

pairs.en: Operating Segment Dynamics-- Peiyou and online enrichment programs both saw year-over-year revenue growth fueled by rising enrollments and sustained user engagement.
pairs.zh:
运营板块动态——Peiyou和在线拓展课程因入学人数增加和用户持续参与，营收均实现同比增长。  
Operating Segment Dynamics-- Peiyou and online enrichment programs both saw year-over-year revenue growth fueled by rising enrollments and sustained user engagement.

pairs.en: Learning Devices-- Delivered year-over-year revenue and sales volume growth; user engagement was reflected by a weekly active rate around 80% and average daily usage near one hour per device.
pairs.zh:
Learning Devices——实现了收入和销售量的同比增长；用户参与度体现在每周活跃率约80%以及每台设备平均每日使用时长接近一小时。  
原文：Learning Devices-- Delivered year-over-year revenue and sales volume growth; user engagement was reflected by a weekly active rate around 80% and average daily usage near one hour per device.

pairs.en: Learning Device Product Mix-- The blended average selling price (ASP) remained below RMB4,000, indicating a shift in product mix.
pairs.zh:
学习设备产品组合——混合平均售价（ASP）保持在RMB4,000以下，表明产品组合发生变化。

Learning Device Product Mix-- The blended average selling price (ASP) remained below RMB4,000, indicating a shift in product mix.

pairs.en: Learning Device Profitability-- Segment reported an adjusted operating loss as it remains in an investment phase targeting long-term competitiveness.
pairs.zh:
学习设备盈利能力——该业务部门报告调整后经营亏损，因其仍处于投资阶段，旨在长期竞争力。

Learning Device Profitability-- Segment reported an adjusted operating loss as it remains in an investment phase targeting long-term competitiveness.

pairs.en: Cash, Investments, and Restricted Cash-- Totaled $3.96 billion as of November 30, 2025, comprising $2.15 billion in cash and equivalents, $1.47 billion in short-term investments, and $339.3 million in restricted cash.
pairs.zh:
现金、投资和受限现金——截至2025年11月30日总额为39.6亿美元，包括21.5亿美元的现金及现金等价物、14.7亿美元的短期投资以及3.393亿美元的受限现金。

Cash, Investments, and Restricted Cash-- Totaled $3.96 billion as of November 30, 2025, comprising $2.15 billion in cash and equivalents, $1.47 billion in short-term investments, and $339.3 million in restricted cash.

pairs.en: Deferred Revenue-- Reported at $1.16 billion at quarter-end.
pairs.zh:
递延收入——季度末报告为$1.16 billion。  
Deferred Revenue-- Reported at $1.16 billion at quarter-end.

pairs.en: Operating Cash Flow-- Net cash from operating activities reached $526.7 million for the quarter.
pairs.zh:
经营活动现金流——本季度经营活动产生的净现金达到5.267亿美元。  
Operating Cash Flow-- Net cash from operating activities reached $526.7 million for the quarter.

pairs.en: Share Repurchase-- Company repurchased 844,856 shares for a total of $27.7 million between October 30, 2025, and January 28, 2026, under a $500 million buyback program authorized in July 2025.
pairs.zh:
股票回购——公司于2025年10月30日至2026年1月28日期间，根据2025年7月批准的5亿美元回购计划，共回购了844,856股，总金额为2770万美元。

Share Repurchase-- Company repurchased 844,856 shares for a total of $27.7 million between October 30, 2025, and January 28, 2026, under a $500 million buyback program authorized in July 2025.

pairs.en: Product Innovation-- Recent launch of the X5 Classic Learning Device aims at the mid-price segment, expanding the product lineup with enhanced AI-based educational features.
pairs.zh:
产品创新——近期推出的X5 Classic Learning Device瞄准中价位段，通过增强的基于AI的教育功能扩展产品线。

原文：
Product Innovation-- Recent launch of the X5 Classic Learning Device aims at the mid-price segment, expanding the product lineup with enhanced AI-based educational features.

pairs.en: AI Engagement Metrics-- The embedded AI assistant "Xiao Si" logged one billion activations as of December 2025.
pairs.zh:
AI互动指标——内置AI助手"Xiao Si"截至2025年12月累计激活次数达到one billion次。

AI Engagement Metrics-- The embedded AI assistant "Xiao Si" logged one billion activations as of December 2025.

pairs.en: National Standard Participation-- Company contributed to China's new national standard on mobile learning terminal functionality, emphasizing industry-wide product quality and safety.
pairs.zh:
参与国家标准制定——公司为中国新的移动学习终端功能国家标准做出贡献，强调全行业产品质量与安全。

National Standard Participation-- Company contributed to China's new national standard on mobile learning terminal functionality, emphasizing industry-wide product quality and safety.

pairs.en: President and Chief Financial Officer Peng stated, "we may face occasional variability and limited visibility in our financial performance due to seasonal demand shifts, competitive pressures and deliberate resource reallocation."
pairs.zh:
总裁兼首席财务官Peng表示："由于季节性需求变化、竞争压力以及有意进行的资源重新分配，我们可能偶尔面临财务业绩的波动和有限的可见性。"

President and Chief Financial Officer Peng stated, "we may face occasional variability and limited visibility in our financial performance due to seasonal demand shifts, competitive pressures and deliberate resource reallocation."

pairs.en: Deputy Chief Financial Officer Ding said, "For learning device business, we reported adjusted operating loss this quarter. As we've emphasized."
pairs.zh:
副首席财务官Ding表示：“关于学习设备业务，本季度我们报告了经调整后的运营亏损。正如我们之前强调的。”

Deputy Chief Financial Officer Ding said, "For learning device business, we reported adjusted operating loss this quarter. As we've emphasized."

pairs.en: Management indicated that "quarterly margin fluctuations" will occur as the portfolio mixes mature and investment-phase business lines, cautioning "against using this quarter's margin performance as a benchmark for future periods."
pairs.zh:
管理层表示，随着投资组合构成趋于成熟以及处于投资阶段的业务线发展，将出现"季度利润率波动"，并警告"不要将本季度的利润率表现作为未来时期的基准。"

Management indicated that "quarterly margin fluctuations" will occur as the portfolio mixes mature and investment-phase business lines, cautioning "against using this quarter's margin performance as a benchmark for future periods."

pairs.en: Year-over-year growth rates are expected to "moderate in the second half of this fiscal year," with top-line growth anticipated to decrease due to a higher comparison base.
pairs.zh:
预计同比增长率将在"本财年下半年放缓"，由于比较基数较高，收入增长预计将下降。  
原文：Year-over-year growth rates are expected to "moderate in the second half of this fiscal year," with top-line growth anticipated to decrease due to a higher comparison base.

pairs.en: TAL Education Group(TAL0.51%)reported a 27% revenue increase and a significant rebound in operating profitability, with substantial gross margin improvement. Management noted stable growth in both the core Peiyou and online enrichment offerings, supported by robust student demand and high user engagement metrics. Investments remain focused on AI-driven product development and expanding the learning device portfolio, though the learning device segment is still operating at a loss. Strategic commentary highlighted the company's resource reallocation and market-responsive execution, with explicit warnings regarding near-term financial variability and an expected moderation of revenue growth in the second half.
pairs.zh:
好来世教育集团(TAL0.51%)报告收入增长27%，营业盈利能力显著反弹，毛利率大幅改善。管理层指出，核心培优和在线素养课程均实现稳定增长，得益于强劲的学生需求和高用户参与度指标。投资仍然集中在AI驱动的产品开发和扩展学习设备产品组合上，尽管学习设备部门仍在亏损运营。战略评述强调了公司的资源重新配置和市场响应执行，并明确警告近期财务波动性以及预计下半年收入增长将放缓。

TAL Education Group(TAL0.51%)reported a 27% revenue increase and a significant rebound in operating profitability, with substantial gross margin improvement. Management noted stable growth in both the core Peiyou and online enrichment offerings, supported by robust student demand and high user engagement metrics. Investments remain focused on AI-driven product development and expanding the learning device portfolio, though the learning device segment is still operating at a loss. Strategic commentary highlighted the company's resource reallocation and market-responsive execution, with explicit warnings regarding near-term financial variability and an expected moderation of revenue growth in the second half.

pairs.en: The company executed $27.7 million in share repurchases as part of an active $500 million program, supporting shareholder value.
pairs.zh:
该公司执行了2770万美元的股票回购，作为一项活跃的5亿美元计划的一部分，以支持股东价值。

The company executed $27.7 million in share repurchases as part of an active $500 million program, supporting shareholder value.

pairs.en: TAL played an advisory role in the development of new Chinese national standards for mobile learning terminal functions, reflecting ongoing regulatory engagement.
pairs.zh:
TAL在新中国移动学习终端功能国家标准的制定中发挥了咨询作用，这反映了持续的监管参与。

TAL played an advisory role in the development of new Chinese national standards for mobile learning terminal functions, reflecting ongoing regulatory engagement.

pairs.en: AI integration milestones were cited, including one billion user activations of the "Xiao Si" assistant, as part of TAL's effort to advance adaptive education technologies.
pairs.zh:
文中提到了AI整合的里程碑，包括“Xiao Si”助手激活用户数达到10亿，这是好未来（TAL）推进自适应教育技术努力的一部分。

AI integration milestones were cited, including one billion user activations of the "Xiao Si" assistant, as part of TAL's effort to advance adaptive education technologies.

pairs.en: Liquidity remained robust, with total cash and investments approaching $4 billion on the balance sheet at quarter-end.
pairs.zh:
流动性依然强劲，资产负债表上的现金和投资总额在季度末接近40亿美元。

Liquidity remained robust, with total cash and investments approaching $4 billion on the balance sheet at quarter-end.

pairs.en: Industry glossary
pairs.zh: 行业术语

pairs.en: Peiyou: TAL's branded small-class offline enrichment programs targeting K-12 students with a standardized curriculum format.
pairs.zh:
培优：好未来旗下的品牌小班线下拓展项目，面向K-12学生，采用标准化课程模式。

Peiyou: TAL's branded small-class offline enrichment programs targeting K-12 students with a standardized curriculum format.

pairs.en: Learning Devices: Hardware products integrating educational content and AI functions, designed to serve as personalized learning companions for students.
pairs.zh:
Learning Devices: 集成教育内容和AI功能的硬件产品，旨在作为学生的个性化学习伴侣。
Learning Devices: Hardware products integrating educational content and AI functions, designed to serve as personalized learning companions for students.

pairs.en: Xiao Si: TAL's proprietary embedded AI assistant designed to facilitate interactive learning support on the company's devices.
pairs.zh:
Xiao Si：TAL专有嵌入式AI助手，旨在为公司设备上的互动学习支持提供便利。  
原文：Xiao Si: TAL's proprietary embedded AI assistant designed to facilitate interactive learning support on the company's devices.

pairs.en: Double 11: China's annual November 11 e-commerce promotion period, heavily influencing consumer electronics and education product sales cycles.
pairs.zh:
双11：中国每年11月11日的电商促销期，对消费电子和教育产品的销售周期影响巨大。

Double 11: China's annual November 11 e-commerce promotion period, heavily influencing consumer electronics and education product sales cycles.

pairs.en: Full Conference Call Transcript
pairs.zh: 完整的电话会议记录

pairs.en: Fang Liu:Thank you all for joining us today for TAL Education Group's third quarter fiscal year twenty six Earnings Conference Call. The earnings release was distributed earlier today and you may find it on the company's IR website, also the newswire. During this call, you will hear from Mr. Alex Peng, President and Chief Financial Officer and Mr. Jackson Ding, Deputy Chief Financial Officer. Following the prepared remarks, Mr. Peng and Mr. Ding will be available to answer your questions. Before we continue, please note that today's discussions will contain forward looking statements made under the Safe Harbor provisions of The U.S. Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995.
pairs.zh:
Fang Liu: 感谢大家今天参加好未来教育集团第三季度26财年财报电话会议。财报已于今日早些时候发布，您可以在公司投资者关系网站或新闻专线上查看。在本次电话会议上，您将听到总裁兼首席财务官 Alex Peng 先生和副首席财务官 Jackson Ding 先生的发言。在准备好的发言之后，彭先生和丁先生将回答大家的提问。在继续之前，请注意，今天的讨论将包含根据1995年美国私人证券诉讼改革法案安全港条款做出的前瞻性陈述。

Fang Liu:Thank you all for joining us today for TAL Education Group's third quarter fiscal year twenty six Earnings Conference Call. The earnings release was distributed earlier today and you may find it on the company's IR website, also the newswire. During this call, you will hear from Mr. Alex Peng, President and Chief Financial Officer and Mr. Jackson Ding, Deputy Chief Financial Officer. Following the prepared remarks, Mr. Peng and Mr. Ding will be available to answer your questions. Before we continue, please note that today's discussions will contain forward looking statements made under the Safe Harbor provisions of The U.S. Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995.

pairs.en: Forward looking statements are subject to risks and uncertainties that may cause actual results to differ materially from our current expectations. Potential risks and uncertainties include but are not limited to those outlined in our public filings with the SEC. For more information about these risks and uncertainties please refer to our filings with the SEC. Also, our earnings release and this call include discussion of certain non-GAAP financial measures. Please refer to our earnings release which contains a reconciliation of the non-GAAP measures to the most directly comparable GAAP measures. I would like to turn the call over to Mr. Alex Peng, Alex, please go ahead.
pairs.zh:
前瞻性陈述受到风险和不确定性的影响，可能导致实际结果与我们当前预期存在重大差异。潜在的风险和不确定性包括但不限于我们在向SEC提交的公开文件中概述的内容。有关这些风险和不确定性的更多信息，请参阅我们向SEC提交的文件。此外，我们的财报发布和本次电话会议包含对某些非GAAP财务指标的讨论。请参阅我们的财报发布，其中包含非GAAP指标与最直接可比的GAAP指标的对账。现在有请Alex Peng先生发言，Alex，请继续。

Forward looking statements are subject to risks and uncertainties that may cause actual results to differ materially from our current expectations. Potential risks and uncertainties include but are not limited to those outlined in our public filings with the SEC. For more information about these risks and uncertainties please refer to our filings with the SEC. Also, our earnings release and this call include discussion of certain non-GAAP financial measures. Please refer to our earnings release which contains a reconciliation of the non-GAAP measures to the most directly comparable GAAP measures. I would like to turn the call over to Mr. Alex Peng, Alex, please go ahead.

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Thank you, Fang, and thanks to all of you for participating in today's conference call. Over the past fiscal quarter, we continue to make steady progress on our strategic priorities. With a consistent focus on supporting the holistic development of our students. Our commitment to innovation, user engagement, and service quality continues to guide our efforts as we refine our offerings and adapt to the evolving learning landscape. Guided by these objectives, our core businesses have continued to operate with stability and consistency. At the same time, we recognize that changes in the market demand and advances in technology continue to introduce new dynamics.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng：谢谢你，Fang，也感谢大家参加今天的电话会议。在过去的一个财季中，我们在战略重点上持续推进，始终专注于支持学生的全面发展。我们对创新、用户参与和服务质量的承诺继续指导我们的工作，不断优化产品并适应不断变化的学习环境。在这些目标的指引下，我们的核心业务持续稳定运行。同时，我们认识到市场需求的变化和技术的进步不断带来新的动态。

Alex Peng:Thank you, Fang, and thanks to all of you for participating in today's conference call. Over the past fiscal quarter, we continue to make steady progress on our strategic priorities. With a consistent focus on supporting the holistic development of our students. Our commitment to innovation, user engagement, and service quality continues to guide our efforts as we refine our offerings and adapt to the evolving learning landscape. Guided by these objectives, our core businesses have continued to operate with stability and consistency. At the same time, we recognize that changes in the market demand and advances in technology continue to introduce new dynamics.

pairs.en: Across several of our newer initiatives, including the learning devices business, we face a highly competitive environment. In areas like content, hardware and AI. In response to this evolving environment, we'll continue to advance our strategic initiatives and flexibly allocate resources to build long term capabilities. Consequently, we may face occasional variability and limited visibility in our financial performance due to seasonal demand shifts, competitive pressures and deliberate resource reallocation. While these factors may cause short term fluctuations, we remain focused on building the long term capabilities needed to seize the opportunities in the market.I will now provide detailed updates starting with our Q3 FY twenty six performance.
pairs.zh:
在我们的几个较新项目中，包括学习设备业务，我们面临高度竞争的环境。这体现在内容、硬件和AI等领域。为了应对这一不断变化的环境，我们将继续推进战略举措，灵活分配资源以构建长期能力。因此，由于季节性需求变化、竞争压力以及有意识的资源重新分配，我们的财务表现可能会偶尔出现波动和可见度有限的情况。虽然这些因素可能引起短期波动，但我们仍专注于建立抓住市场机遇所需的长期能力。接下来，我将从26财年第三季度的业绩开始，提供详细的最新情况。

原文：
Across several of our newer initiatives, including the learning devices business, we face a highly competitive environment. In areas like content, hardware and AI. In response to this evolving environment, we'll continue to advance our strategic initiatives and flexibly allocate resources to build long term capabilities. Consequently, we may face occasional variability and limited visibility in our financial performance due to seasonal demand shifts, competitive pressures and deliberate resource reallocation. While these factors may cause short term fluctuations, we remain focused on building the long term capabilities needed to seize the opportunities in the market.I will now provide detailed updates starting with our Q3 FY twenty six performance.

pairs.en: During the quarter, our learning services recorded year over year revenue growth across both offline Peiyou programs and online enrichment offerings. This was driven by sustained user demand and reflects our commitment to providing students with high quality learning experiences through a diverse portfolio of the enrichment programs delivered in both offline and online formats. Meanwhile, we maintain a disciplined approach to expanding the Peiyou learning center network. Balancing demand with operational capacity, efficiencies and long term sustainability. Positive feedback from parents and students alongside solid operating metrics such as retention rates, affirms the trust placed in our products and the consistency of our service standards. Our online enrichment learning programs also maintain year over year growth during the quarter.
pairs.zh:
在本季度，我们的学习服务在线上线下均录得同比增长，包括线下Peiyou项目和在线enrichment课程。这得益于持续的用户需求，也体现了我们通过线上线下多种enrichment项目组合，为学生提供高质量学习体验的承诺。同时，我们以严谨的方式扩展Peiyou学习中心网络，平衡需求与运营能力、效率及长期可持续性。来自家长和学生的积极反馈，以及诸如留存率等稳健的运营指标，印证了市场对我们产品的信任以及我们服务标准的一致性。本季度，我们的在线enrichment学习项目也保持了同比增长。

During the quarter, our learning services recorded year over year revenue growth across both offline Peiyou programs and online enrichment offerings. This was driven by sustained user demand and reflects our commitment to providing students with high quality learning experiences through a diverse portfolio of the enrichment programs delivered in both offline and online formats. Meanwhile, we maintain a disciplined approach to expanding the Peiyou learning center network. Balancing demand with operational capacity, efficiencies and long term sustainability. Positive feedback from parents and students alongside solid operating metrics such as retention rates, affirms the trust placed in our products and the consistency of our service standards. Our online enrichment learning programs also maintain year over year growth during the quarter.

pairs.en: By leveraging technology driven innovation, we continue to enhance users' learning experience. Building on this approach, we introduced immersive classroom solutions to improve engagement and learning outcomes. We also extended our offerings to include more technology themes such as three d printing, with the goal of fostering interest in emerging technologies and supporting future skill development.Alongside our learning services, our content solutions encompass a wide range of offerings. With learning devices remaining a key focus for our long term development. The learning device market continues to evolve, shaped by ongoing advancements in hardware, software and AI technologies.
pairs.zh:
通过技术驱动的创新，我们持续提升用户的学习体验。基于这一方法，我们推出了immersive classroom solutions，以提高参与度和学习成果。我们还扩展了产品范围，纳入更多技术主题，如three d printing，旨在激发对新兴技术的兴趣并支持未来技能发展。除学习服务外，我们的content solutions涵盖广泛产品线。学习设备仍是我们长期发展的关键焦点。学习设备市场在硬件、软件和AI技术的持续进步中不断演变。

By leveraging technology driven innovation, we continue to enhance users' learning experience. Building on this approach, we introduced immersive classroom solutions to improve engagement and learning outcomes. We also extended our offerings to include more technology themes such as three d printing, with the goal of fostering interest in emerging technologies and supporting future skill development.Alongside our learning services, our content solutions encompass a wide range of offerings. With learning devices remaining a key focus for our long term development. The learning device market continues to evolve, shaped by ongoing advancements in hardware, software and AI technologies.

pairs.en: Given this context, we are focused on further enhancing our devices across three key areas: User learning experience, AI enabled capabilities, and overall effectiveness. Compared with general purpose AI models, we believe an educational AI agent should go beyond simply providing students with correct answers. We believe they should focus on guiding students through the learning process. Adapting explanations to their level of understanding, diagnosing learning gaps, and supporting personalized learning path. Building on this vision, we have incorporated over two decades of educational insight into the interaction logic of our learning devices.
pairs.zh:
鉴于这一背景，我们重点在三个关键领域进一步提升设备：用户学习体验、AI赋能的能力以及整体有效性。与通用AI模型相比，我们认为教育AI agent应当不仅仅是给学生提供正确答案。我们认为它们应当专注于引导学生的学习过程，根据他们的理解水平调整解释，诊断学习差距，并支持个性化学习路径。基于这一愿景，我们将二十多年的教育洞察融入学习设备的交互逻辑中。

Given this context, we are focused on further enhancing our devices across three key areas: User learning experience, AI enabled capabilities, and overall effectiveness. Compared with general purpose AI models, we believe an educational AI agent should go beyond simply providing students with correct answers. We believe they should focus on guiding students through the learning process. Adapting explanations to their level of understanding, diagnosing learning gaps, and supporting personalized learning path. Building on this vision, we have incorporated over two decades of educational insight into the interaction logic of our learning devices.

pairs.en: Instead of simply providing answers, our devices are designed to apply structured instructional processes and guided teaching approaches with the aim of approximating one on one tutoring experiences. This design enables them to function not only as tools for problem solving, but also learning companions that provide individualized support. Looking ahead, we'll continue to enhance our AI functions including capabilities in problem solving, explanation and other forms of learning assistance. Our goal is to steadily evolve our learning devices into personalized AI companions that inspire thinking and support deeper learning.In addition to learning devices, we're also exploring new product formats to address a range of use cases.
pairs.zh:
我们的设备并非简单提供答案，而是设计采用结构化教学流程和引导式教学方法，力求接近一对一辅导体验。这种设计使其不仅能作为解题工具，更能成为提供个性化支持的学习伴侣。展望未来，我们将持续增强AI功能，包括解题、讲解及其他学习辅助能力。我们的目标是将学习设备稳步发展为启发思考、支持深度学习的个性化AI伴侣。除了学习设备，我们也在探索新产品形态，以应对多种使用场景。

原文：
Instead of simply providing answers, our devices are designed to apply structured instructional processes and guided teaching approaches with the aim of approximating one on one tutoring experiences. This design enables them to function not only as tools for problem solving, but also learning companions that provide individualized support. Looking ahead, we'll continue to enhance our AI functions including capabilities in problem solving, explanation and other forms of learning assistance. Our goal is to steadily evolve our learning devices into personalized AI companions that inspire thinking and support deeper learning.In addition to learning devices, we're also exploring new product formats to address a range of use cases.

pairs.en: At CES twenty six, we showcased several early stage concepts including our AI buddy, which received industry CES picks award. Designed for children aged six to 12, the smart companion uses interactive features such as voice, touch, and motion based interactions to support age appropriate engagement. These initiatives reflect our broader exploration of how technology can support children's development in learning related and everyday use scenarios, and with a continued focus on responsible design and practical application. So with that overview, I'd like to turn to our financial performance for the quarter. Our net revenues were $770,200,000 or 5,480,400,000.0 for the quarter representing year over year increases of 27% and 26.8% in U.S. dollar and RMB terms respectively.
pairs.zh:
在CES twenty six上，我们展示了几项早期概念产品，其中包括荣获行业CES picks大奖的AI buddy。这款智能伴侣专为6至12岁儿童设计，通过语音、触摸和基于动作的交互等互动功能，支持适龄的互动体验。这些举措反映了我们在更广泛领域中的探索，即技术如何在学习和日常使用场景中支持儿童发展，同时我们持续关注负责任的设计和实际应用。基于以上概述，接下来我将汇报本季度的财务表现。本季度我们的净营收为770,200,000美元，即5,480,400,000.0元人民币，按美元和人民币计算，同比分别增长27%和26.8%。

At CES twenty six, we showcased several early stage concepts including our AI buddy, which received industry CES picks award. Designed for children aged six to 12, the smart companion uses interactive features such as voice, touch, and motion based interactions to support age appropriate engagement. These initiatives reflect our broader exploration of how technology can support children's development in learning related and everyday use scenarios, and with a continued focus on responsible design and practical application. So with that overview, I'd like to turn to our financial performance for the quarter. Our net revenues were $770,200,000 or 5,480,400,000.0 for the quarter representing year over year increases of 27% and 26.8% in U.S. dollar and RMB terms respectively.

I will now hand the call over to Jackson who will provide an update on the operational developments across our core business lines and a review of our financial results for the fiscal third quarter. So Jackson, over to you.

I will now hand the call over to Jackson who will provide an update on the operational developments across our core business lines and a review of our financial results for the fiscal third quarter. pairs.en: Jackson Ding:Thank you, Alex. I am pleased to walk you through our operational highlights and financial results across our core businesses for the third fiscal quarter. Please note that all financial data for the quarter are unaudited. During the quarter, Peiyou small class enrichment programs demonstrated stable operations delivering year over year growth driven by increased enrollment. We continued to expand access to high quality enrichment learning programs for a broader user base. Supporting students' holistic development. In our online enrichment learning programs, we have embraced a technology driven approach to enhance the learning experience. For instance, some of our humanities courses now feature immersive online classrooms powered by virtual settings and interactive activities.
pairs.zh:
Jackson Ding：谢谢，Alex。我很高兴向大家介绍我们在第三财季的核心业务运营亮点和财务业绩。请注意，本季度所有财务数据均未经审计。在本季度中，Peiyou小班培优课程运营稳定，受入学人数增长推动实现了同比提升。我们持续为更广泛的用户群体拓展优质培优学习课程的覆盖，助力学生全面发展。在我们的在线培优学习课程中，我们采用技术驱动的方法来提升学习体验。例如，我们的一些人文课程现在配备了由虚拟场景和互动活动驱动的沉浸式在线课堂。

Jackson Ding:Thank you, Alex. I am pleased to walk you through our operational highlights and financial results across our core businesses for the third fiscal quarter. Please note that all financial data for the quarter are unaudited. During the quarter, Peiyou small class enrichment programs demonstrated stable operations delivering year over year growth driven by increased enrollment. We continued to expand access to high quality enrichment learning programs for a broader user base. Supporting students' holistic development. In our online enrichment learning programs, we have embraced a technology driven approach to enhance the learning experience. For instance, some of our humanities courses now feature immersive online classrooms powered by virtual settings and interactive activities.

pairs.en: Designed to boost student engagement and support learning outcomes. Students role play as protagonists from classic literature and collaborate with peers to complete themed challenges, deepening their grasp of character traits and story backgrounds. These immersive programs also incorporate gamified learning mechanisms during class to promote learning and comprehension, followed by out of class challenges that encourage reinforcement of key concepts. This cyclical engagement helps students internalize the material while building the language skills and knowledge needed for effective expression. Looking ahead, we will continue to build on this foundation by further integrating technology into our engagement tools and instructional design. This effort will be supported by sustained investments in content, product development, and services.
pairs.zh:
旨在提升学生参与度并支持学习成果。学生扮演经典文学中的主角，与同伴合作完成主题挑战，加深对人物特征和故事背景的理解。这些沉浸式课程还在课堂中融入游戏化学习机制以促进学习和理解，随后通过课外挑战鼓励巩固关键概念。这种循环参与帮助学生内化学习内容，同时培养有效表达所需的语言技能和知识。展望未来，我们将继续在此基础上，进一步将技术融入我们的参与工具和教学设计中。这一努力将得到对内容、产品开发和服务的持续投入的支持。

Designed to boost student engagement and support learning outcomes. Students role play as protagonists from classic literature and collaborate with peers to complete themed challenges, deepening their grasp of character traits and story backgrounds. These immersive programs also incorporate gamified learning mechanisms during class to promote learning and comprehension, followed by out of class challenges that encourage reinforcement of key concepts. This cyclical engagement helps students internalize the material while building the language skills and knowledge needed for effective expression. Looking ahead, we will continue to build on this foundation by further integrating technology into our engagement tools and instructional design. This effort will be supported by sustained investments in content, product development, and services.

pairs.en: Our focus remains on the continuous improvement of learning experience with the goal of supporting student engagement while meeting the evolving demands of online learning.Next, let's turn to our learning device business. Our diverse portfolio equipped with intelligent features and learning resources is designed to empower users on their self learning journeys. Operationally, our learning devices delivered year over year growth in both revenue and sales volume this quarter. The average weekly active rate among learning device users remained at approximately 80% with average daily usage per active device at approximately one hour. These metrics reflect sustained engagement even as we expanded both our product lineup and our user base.
pairs.zh:
我们持续专注于改善学习体验，旨在支持学生参与度，同时满足在线学习不断变化的需求。接下来，让我们看看我们的学习设备业务。我们多样化的产品组合配备了智能功能和学习资源，旨在赋能用户的自学之旅。从运营层面看，本季度我们的学习设备在营收和销量上均实现了同比增长。学习设备用户的周平均活跃率保持在约80%，每台活跃设备的日均使用时长约为1小时。这些指标反映了即便我们扩大了产品线和用户基础，用户参与度依然持续。

Our focus remains on the continuous improvement of learning experience with the goal of supporting student engagement while meeting the evolving demands of online learning.Next, let's turn to our learning device business. Our diverse portfolio equipped with intelligent features and learning resources is designed to empower users on their self learning journeys. Operationally, our learning devices delivered year over year growth in both revenue and sales volume this quarter. The average weekly active rate among learning device users remained at approximately 80% with average daily usage per active device at approximately one hour. These metrics reflect sustained engagement even as we expanded both our product lineup and our user base.

pairs.en: On the product innovation front, as Alex highlighted, we are transforming learning devices into more intelligent learning tutoring AI companions rather than simple problem solving tools. Our AI Thinky one-on-one, the interactive step by step tutoring AI companion embedded in our learning devices, has facilitated over hundreds of thousands of hours of guided learning. Meanwhile, our AI assistant, Xiao Si, remains a trusted companion for users. As of December 2025, students have activated it 1,000,000,000 times. These developments reaffirm our belief in AI's role in supporting students' learning and development.Earlier this month, we launched the X5 Classic Learning Device, positioned as a comprehensive solution for the mid price segment. This new product further expands our product lineup.
pairs.zh:
在产品创新方面，正如Alex强调的，我们正在将学习设备转变为更智能的学习辅导AI伙伴，而非单纯的解题工具。我们的AI Thinky one-on-one——内置于学习设备中的交互式分步辅导AI伙伴，已累计协助超过数十万小时的引导式学习。与此同时，AI助手小思始终是用户信赖的伙伴。截至2025年12月，学生用户已激活该功能达1,000,000,000次。这些进展再次印证了我们在AI支持学生学习和成长方面的信念。本月初，我们推出了X5 Classic学习设备，定位为中端价位段的综合解决方案。这款新产品进一步丰富了我们的产品线。

原文：
On the product innovation front, as Alex highlighted, we are transforming learning devices into more intelligent learning tutoring AI companions rather than simple problem solving tools. Our AI Thinky one-on-one, the interactive step by step tutoring AI companion embedded in our learning devices, has facilitated over hundreds of thousands of hours of guided learning. Meanwhile, our AI assistant, Xiao Si, remains a trusted companion for users. As of December 2025, students have activated it 1,000,000,000 times. These developments reaffirm our belief in AI's role in supporting students' learning and development.Earlier this month, we launched the X5 Classic Learning Device, positioned as a comprehensive solution for the mid price segment. This new product further expands our product lineup.

pairs.en: Designed as an all rounder, the X5 integrates a systematic learning platform with specialized modules with the aim of structuring and supporting self directed learning. Beyond our business progress, we contributed to the ongoing development of the industry. In October, the standardization administration of China released the national standard for mobile learning terminal function requirements. By sharing practical insights from our device ecosystem, we participated in the formation of the standard. We believe that well defined standards help elevate product quality, protect user interests, and support the industry's sustainable development. That concludes the operational update.And I'd like to now walk you through our key financial results for the third fiscal quarter. Our net revenues were $770,200,000 or RMB5,480.4 million.
pairs.zh:
作为一款全能型产品，X5将系统化学习平台与专业模块相结合，旨在构建并支持自主学习。除了业务进展，我们还为行业的持续发展做出了贡献。10月，中国国家标准化管理委员会发布了移动学习终端功能要求的国家标准。通过分享我们设备生态系统的实践见解，我们参与了该标准的制定。我们相信，完善的标准化有助于提升产品质量、保护用户利益，并支持行业的可持续发展。业务更新部分到此结束。接下来，我将为大家介绍第三财季的主要财务业绩。我们的净收入为770,200,000美元，即人民币5,480.4百万元。

Designed as an all rounder, the X5 integrates a systematic learning platform with specialized modules with the aim of structuring and supporting self directed learning. Beyond our business progress, we contributed to the ongoing development of the industry. In October, the standardization administration of China released the national standard for mobile learning terminal function requirements. By sharing practical insights from our device ecosystem, we participated in the formation of the standard. We believe that well defined standards help elevate product quality, protect user interests, and support the industry's sustainable development. That concludes the operational update.And I'd like to now walk you through our key financial results for the third fiscal quarter. Our net revenues were $770,200,000 or RMB5,480.4 million.

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Thanks, Jackson. I'd like to share some thoughts on our outlook for the company's future development. We view the intersection of learning and technology as one of our long term strategic priorities. By integrating technology with our industry expertise, we aim to continue enhancing our product design and service delivery across our businesses. In addition, we are strengthening our go to market capabilities. For newer businesses such as learning devices, we are implementing more agile channel management strategies, dynamically optimizing resource deployment based on market conditions, and performance indicators. At the same time, we are reinforcing our multi channel ecosystem by combining digital and physical touch points to broaden market reach and user engagement.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng:谢谢，Jackson。我想就公司未来发展的前景分享一些看法。我们将学习与技术的交汇视为长期战略重点之一。通过将技术与行业专长相结合，我们旨在持续提升各业务的产品设计和服务交付。此外，我们正在加强市场进入能力。对于较新的业务，如learning devices，我们正在实施更灵活渠道管理策略，根据市场状况和绩效指标动态优化资源配置。同时，我们通过结合数字和物理触点来强化多渠道生态系统，以扩大市场覆盖和用户参与。

We evaluate factors such as our organizational readiness and capability, our operational efficiency, the regional market demand—really, this does come down to a very micro level of districts and neighborhood—and user acceptance of our offerings.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng：谢谢，Felix。我是Alex。首先，感谢您的友好评价以及对公司长期持续的关注。我来回答这个问题，并更新一下Peiyou第三季度的业绩和展望。在第三财季，Peiyou的线下素质教育课程实现了同比增长，这主要与我们学习中心网络的扩张保持一致。我们在网络扩张中始终坚持严谨的运营策略，会评估组织的准备情况和能力、运营效率、区域市场需求——这实际上要深入到非常微观的街道和社区层面——以及用户对我们产品的接受度。

原文：
Alex Peng:Thanks, Felix. This is Alex. Let me first of all thank you for your kind remark and your continued long term attention to the company. Let me take this question. So I'll provide an update on Peiyou's Q3 performance and outlook. During the third fiscal quarter, Peiyou offline enrichment programs delivered year over year revenue growth which is largely aligned with the expansion of our learning center network. We really maintain our disciplined operational approach to network expansion. We evaluate factors such as our organizational readiness and capability, our operational efficiency, the regional market demand—really, this does come down to a very micro level of districts and neighborhood—and user acceptance of our offerings.

pairs.en: So based on this measured and multidimensional approach, the business remains on a stable growth trajectory. Our operating metrics, really, they show that we built a solid and sustainable business framework, and we aim to maintain this level of operational efficiency for the upcoming winter season. So when I look ahead, I think we'll continue to manage the pace of learning center expansion prudently, balancing growth with operational efficiency, and long term sustainability. So when I look at the drivers of Peiyou's year over year growth, revenue growth during the quarter was primarily driven by increased enrollments while our ASP remained relatively stable.
pairs.zh:
基于这种衡量和多维的方法，业务仍保持稳定增长轨迹。我们的运营指标确实表明，我们建立了一个坚实且可持续的业务框架，我们旨在为即将到来的冬季保持这一运营效率水平。因此，展望未来，我认为我们将继续审慎管理学习中心扩张的步伐，平衡增长与运营效率以及长期可持续性。所以，当我审视培优（Peiyou）同比增长的驱动因素时，本季度收入增长主要由入学人数增加推动，而我们的ASP保持相对稳定。

原文：So based on this measured and multidimensional approach, the business remains on a stable growth trajectory. Our operating metrics, really, they show that we built a solid and sustainable business framework, and we aim to maintain this level of operational efficiency for the upcoming winter season. pairs.en: So, this performance really reflects both market demand for high quality enrichment programs and the internal capabilities we've been developing. If you look at these capabilities: product design, service quality, and content development just to name a few. Right? So on the product and service front, we really emphasize a standardized teaching framework while fostering an interactive student centric classroom experience. On the talent front, we train our lecturers in house to ensure consistent teaching quality. So, provided that these growth drivers remain in place, we expect this business line to continue growing.
pairs.zh:

pairs.en: At the same time, given that we are coming off a higher comparison base and we talked about this in the past as well—it's coming off a higher comparison base than in prior years—we anticipate a gradual moderation in the pace of revenue growth in FY 2026. pairs.en: Charlotte Wei:Good evening. Thank you for taking my question and congratulations on a strong set of results. My question is related to the top line growth momentum. We noticed that the growth kind of slowed down compared to last quarter. Could you please elaborate the key reasons behind this trend? In addition, how should we think about the revenue growth outlook for different business lines, especially for learning devices for the upcoming quarter? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
Charlotte Wei：晚上好。感谢您给我提问的机会，祝贺公司取得强劲业绩。我的问题与营收增长势头有关。我们注意到，与上季度相比，增长有所放缓。能否请您详细说明这一趋势背后的主要原因？此外，对于不同业务线（尤其是学习设备业务）在下一季度的收入增长前景，我们应该如何看待？谢谢。

Charlotte Wei:Good evening. Thank you for taking my question and congratulations on a strong set of results. My question is related to the top line growth momentum. pairs.en: Jackson Ding:Charlotte, thanks for the question. This is Jackson and I'll take this one. For your question regarding revenue trend, I think we talked about this a few times in the previous quarters. As we continue to grow, our growth rate will taper off naturally, normalizing to a more moderate growth result. More specifically, if we look at this quarter, the moderation in our top line growth was primarily driven by a deceleration in the growth rate of our learning device business, which stems from multiple factors. First, it reflects the evolving patterns in our learning device business, which is transitioning from its initial rapid expansion phase to a more sustained growth trajectory.
pairs.zh:
Jackson Ding: Charlotte，谢谢你的提问。我是Jackson，我来回答这个问题。关于你提到的收入趋势问题，我想我们在前几个季度已经讨论过几次。随着我们持续增长，我们的增长率自然会逐渐放缓，回归到更温和的增长水平。具体来说，如果看本季度，我们营收增长的放缓主要是由学习设备业务增长率下降所驱动的，这源于多个因素。首先，它反映了我们学习设备业务模式的演变，即从最初的高速扩张阶段过渡到更可持续的增长轨道。

Jackson Ding:Charlotte, thanks for the question. This is Jackson and I'll take this one. For your question regarding revenue trend, I think we talked about this a few times in the previous quarters. As we continue to grow, our growth rate will taper off naturally, normalizing to a more moderate growth result. More specifically, if we look at this quarter, the moderation in our top line growth was primarily driven by a deceleration in the growth rate of our learning device business, which stems from multiple factors. First, it reflects the evolving patterns in our learning device business, which is transitioning from its initial rapid expansion phase to a more sustained growth trajectory.

pairs.en: Another consideration is the timing of a product launch across fiscal years, creating a different kind of comparable base. If you look at last year's fiscal quarter three, for example, it benefited from late August introduction of some of our new product lines back then. While this year, our major product launches happened earlier in the year in May, boosting fiscal quarter two sales instead. So the shift in product launch cycles resulted in different sales paths between the two fiscal years, leading to a higher comparison base in quarter three of last year.Additionally, as we have consistently emphasized in the previous quarters, we continue to prioritize long term competitiveness.
pairs.zh:
另一个考虑因素是新产品的发布时间跨越不同财年，从而形成了不同的可比基础。例如，去年第三财季受益于我们在当年8月下旬推出的部分新产品线。而今年，我们的主要产品发布提前到了5月，从而提振了第二财季的销售。因此，产品发布周期的变化导致两个财年的销售路径不同，使得去年第三财季的对比基数更高。此外，正如我们在前几个季度一直强调的，我们继续优先关注长期竞争力。

原文：
Another consideration is the timing of a product launch across fiscal years, creating a different kind of comparable base. If you look at last year's fiscal quarter three, for example, it benefited from late August introduction of some of our new product lines back then. While this year, our major product launches happened earlier in the year in May, boosting fiscal quarter two sales instead. So the shift in product launch cycles resulted in different sales paths between the two fiscal years, leading to a higher comparison base in quarter three of last year.Additionally, as we have consistently emphasized in the previous quarters, we continue to prioritize long term competitiveness.

pairs.en: By applying this philosophy across all business lines, we aim to balance sustainable high quality growth with prudent execution. Given factors such as market condition, investment cycles, and seasonal fluctuations, dynamic and timely adjustments to operational actions may be required, potentially resulting in quarterly variability in financial performance. Looking ahead, we expect continued fluctuation in learning device revenue. Now coming back to the group level, we believe year over year growth rate will moderate in the second half of this fiscal year, primarily due to a higher comparison base. Consequently, the year over year growth rate in the second half of this fiscal year is expected to be lower than in the first half.
pairs.zh:
将这一理念应用于所有业务线，我们旨在平衡可持续的高质量增长与审慎执行。考虑到市场状况、投资周期和季节性波动等因素，可能需要对运营行动进行动态且及时的调整，从而导致财务业绩在季度间出现波动。展望未来，我们预计学习设备（learning device）收入将持续波动。现在回到集团层面，我们认为本财年下半年的同比增长率将放缓，这主要是由于较高的比较基数。因此，本财年下半年的同比增长率预计将低于上半年。

原文：
By applying this philosophy across all business lines, we aim to balance sustainable high quality growth with prudent execution. Given factors such as market condition, investment cycles, and seasonal fluctuations, dynamic and timely adjustments to operational actions may be required, potentially resulting in quarterly variability in financial performance. Looking ahead, we expect continued fluctuation in learning device revenue. Now coming back to the group level, we believe year over year growth rate will moderate in the second half of this fiscal year, primarily due to a higher comparison base. Consequently, the year over year growth rate in the second half of this fiscal year is expected to be lower than in the first half.

pairs.en: Our growth strategy remains grounded in the value we deliver to our users and the society. This guiding principle informs our business decisions and operations as we continue to develop our business. Over the long term, we believe that sustainable growth is driven by three core factors: continuous innovation, strengthened organizational capabilities, and disciplined operational execution. By maintaining our focus on these fundamentals, we aim to support sustainable development over time as we continue developing solutions that address learning needs and contribute to education development. Charlotte, I hope that answers your question.
pairs.zh:
我们的增长战略始终立足于为用户和社会创造的价值。这一指导原则贯穿于我们持续发展业务过程中的商业决策与运营。长期来看，我们相信可持续增长由三大核心因素驱动：持续创新、强化组织能力以及严谨的运营执行。通过专注于这些基本要素，我们旨在支持长期可持续发展，同时持续开发满足学习需求、助力教育发展的解决方案。Charlotte，希望这回答了你的问题。

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Hi, Liqing. This is Alex. Thanks for the question. So let me begin with our Q3 sales performance. pairs.en: So speaking of competitiveness, if I turn to the competitive landscape question: We are really operating in a dynamic environment where artificial intelligence advancements are fundamentally transforming the educational technology landscape. Our approach really combines vertical domain large models with general AI capabilities to create more intelligent personalized learning experiences.One of the... when I think about it, one of the common challenges in at home learning involves students encountering difficult questions or unclear unfamiliar concepts, but they don't have immediate access to teacher support. Rather than simply providing answers in that moment our AI solutions really aim to emulate the human teaching methodologies. Right?
pairs.zh:

So speaking of competitiveness, if I turn to the competitive landscape question: We are really operating in a dynamic environment where artificial intelligence advancements are fundamentally transforming the educational technology landscape. Our approach really combines vertical domain large models with general AI capabilities to create more intelligent personalized learning experiences.One of the... when I think about it, one of the common challenges in at home learning involves students encountering difficult questions or unclear unfamiliar concepts, but they don't have immediate access to teacher support. Rather than simply providing answers in that moment our AI solutions really aim to emulate the human teaching methodologies. Right?

pairs.en: So you break down complex problems, you offer tailored explanations, you take in the student's feedback, and then you guide students through learning progression pathways. So to this end, we are developing our AI agents full stack capabilities across these diverse learning scenarios. Investment in product innovation and channel expansion continue to yield positive feedback, which really underscores the user value we're creating with our products. Our key user engagement metrics remain very solid, with an average weekly active rate exceeding 80% and then average daily user time per active device at approximately one hour. During the recent Double 11 promotion period, if you look at our market share performance, that's really aligned with our expectations.

原文：
Jackson Ding:Timothy, thank you for the question. This is Jackson. Let me take this one. Let me maybe first address the key drivers of our operating margin performance this quarter. On a year over year basis, the improvement primarily reflects the volatility in our selling and marketing expenses, coupled with disciplined cost management across all business lines that continue to drive operating leverage. In this quarter, online marketing and branding expenses for our learning device business were lower compared to the same period last year. Our marketing expenditures naturally fluctuate as we dynamically adjust spending levels and marketing strategies based on market conditions, campaign performance, and strategic priorities.

pairs.en: As we continue building our long term core competitiveness, we actively diversify our marketing approaches across different platforms. Brand related expenses also declined during this period. On a sequential basis, online marketing and branding expenses for learning device business also declined. In addition, for online enrichment learning programs, this quarter is not peak season for online customer acquisition, resulting in lower online marketing expenditure compared to Q2. We consider these adjustments a normal part of resource allocation as we balance short term needs with the long term objectives, and the resulting margin volatility aligns with our expectation.For these reasons, we would caution against using this quarter's margin performance as a benchmark for future periods.
pairs.zh:
在我们持续构建长期核心竞争力的过程中，我们积极在不同平台上多样化营销方式。品牌相关支出在此期间也有所下降。环比来看，学习设备业务的线上营销和品牌支出也有所减少。此外，对于线上培优项目，本季度并非线上获客旺季，因此线上营销支出相比第二季度有所下降。我们认为这些调整是资源分配的正常部分，因为我们平衡短期需求与长期目标，由此产生的利润率波动符合我们的预期。基于这些原因，我们提醒不要将本季度的利润率表现作为未来时期的基准。

As we continue building our long term core competitiveness, we actively diversify our marketing approaches across different platforms. Brand related expenses also declined during this period. On a sequential basis, online marketing and branding expenses for learning device business also declined. In addition, for online enrichment learning programs, this quarter is not peak season for online customer acquisition, resulting in lower online marketing expenditure compared to Q2. We consider these adjustments a normal part of resource allocation as we balance short term needs with the long term objectives, and the resulting margin volatility aligns with our expectation.For these reasons, we would caution against using this quarter's margin performance as a benchmark for future periods.

pairs.en: For learning device business, we reported adjusted operating loss this quarter. As we've emphasized, we prioritize establishing long term competitiveness over short term profitability for this emerging business. The breakeven time line remains uncertain. We are continuing to refine our offerings through new product development, content expansion, AI driven user experience enhancement, and ongoing optimization in operations and sales channels. Looking at our overall margin profile, it is important to note that we are managing a portfolio comprising both mature profitable businesses and newer initiatives still in the investment phase. This dynamic will result in quarterly margin fluctuations, making it inappropriate to extrapolate current results as indicative of future trends. Timothy, I hope that answers your question.
pairs.zh:
对于学习设备业务，本季度我们报告了调整后运营亏损。正如我们一直强调的，我们优先考虑为这一新兴业务建立长期竞争力，而非短期盈利能力。盈亏平衡时间线仍不确定。我们正通过新产品开发、内容扩展、AI驱动的用户体验提升，以及运营和销售渠道的持续优化，不断完善产品组合。从整体利润率情况来看，需要注意的是，我们管理的业务组合既包含成熟盈利业务，也包含仍处于投资阶段的新业务。这种动态将导致季度利润率波动，因此不宜将当前结果推演为未来趋势的指标。Timothy，希望这回答了你的问题。

For learning device business, we reported adjusted operating loss this quarter. As we've emphasized, we prioritize establishing long term competitiveness over short term profitability for this emerging business. The breakeven time line remains uncertain. We are continuing to refine our offerings through new product development, content expansion, AI driven user experience enhancement, and ongoing optimization in operations and sales channels. Looking at our overall margin profile, it is important to note that we are managing a portfolio comprising both mature profitable businesses and newer initiatives still in the investment phase. This dynamic will result in quarterly margin fluctuations, making it inappropriate to extrapolate current results as indicative of future trends. Timothy, I hope that answers your question.
